items.title: Canadian Oil Sands Firms Reach Carbon Capture Deal With Alberta
items.description: A group of Canadian oil sands producers reached an agreement with the Alberta and federal governments on next steps toward building a carbon capture and storage system.

items.title: Stock Rally Drives Calpers to 14.8% Return in Fiscal 2026
items.description: The California Public Employees’ Retirement System reported a 14.8% gain for its latest fiscal year, with results driven by stocks and private equity.

items.title: Trump Restarts Iran Blockade as US Plans 20% Hormuz Charge
items.description: President Donald Trump reinstated the US blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanded a 20% reimbursement on all other cargo shipped through the waterway.
